heading: Required Access
body:
You need the [Project Data Access Admin](<Project Data Access Admin>) or higher role to create
and manage MongoDB Vector Search indexes.

You cannot create more than:

- 3 indexes (regardless of the type, `search` or `vector`) on Free clusters.

- 10 indexes on Flex clusters.

We recommend that you create no more than 2500 search indexes on a
single `M10+` cluster.
